entity.summary: BNB Chain decentralized spot and perpetual trading platform with historical AMM activity and substantial cumulative DEX volume, but no clearly reported recent period volume in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Grizzly Trade as a decentralized exchange for spot and perpetual trading and reports substantial cumulative AMM volume on BNB Chain, but the reviewed registry snapshot does not expose current 30-day, 7-day, or 24-hour volume metrics. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead status. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Grizzly Trade project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Grizzly Trade AMM protocol information and cumulative volume
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Grizzly Trade as a decentralized spot and perpetual exchange and reports substantial cumulative BNB Chain DEX volume, but no current period volume metrics, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Grizzly Trade AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Grizzly Trade AMM as a BNB Chain decentralized exchange.
